cards.meaning: **Seven of Cups** (upright) in the *Self* position speaks of many tempting visions; discernment needed. Its keywords — fantasy, choices, temptation, wishful thinking — color how this card is moving for you now.

**The Chariot** (upright) in the *Mirror* position speaks of victory through directed will and emotional self-command. Its keywords — will, direction, drive, mastery — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Ascendant in Cancer (house 1) — The Chariot working through identity and embodiment.

**Ace of Wands** (reversed) in the *Shadow* position speaks of a false start, or scattered, ungrounded energy. Its keywords — spark, inspiration, drive, potential — color how this card is moving for you now.

cards.meaning: **Page of Wands** (reversed) in the *Today* position speaks of restlessness, unfinished starts. Its keywords — curiosity, enthusiasm, exploration, free spirit — color how this card is moving for you now.

**Queen of Pentacles** (upright) in the *You* position speaks of nurturing, resourceful, grounded care. Its keywords — nurture, abundance, practicality, care — color how this card is moving for you now.

**The Sun** (upright) in the *The Other* position speaks of clear warmth, vitality, and the joy of being fully seen. Its keywords — vitality, clarity, joy, truth — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Sun in Pisces (house 10) — The Sun working through calling, visibility, and public role.

**Ten of Pentacles** (upright) in the *The Bond* position speaks of lasting wealth, legacy, and rootedness. Its keywords — legacy, family, stability, completion — color how this card is moving for you now.

**The Hanged Man** (upright) in the *The Lesson* position speaks of the wisdom of surrender and seeing the world upside-down. Its keywords — surrender, reversal, new perspective, pause — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Neptune in Taurus (house 11) — The Hanged Man working through community, future, and networks.

**Ace of Swords** (upright) in the *The Becoming* position speaks of a piercing clarity that cuts to truth. Its keywords — clarity, truth, breakthrough, insight — color how this card is moving for you now.

cards.meaning: **Two of Cups** (reversed) in the *Self* position speaks of imbalance, tension, or a connection cooling. Its keywords — union, connection, attraction, mutuality — color how this card is moving for you now.

**Ten of Cups** (upright) in the *Mirror* position speaks of lasting emotional fulfillment and belonging. Its keywords — harmony, family, fulfillment, belonging — color how this card is moving for you now.

**The Emperor** (upright) in the *Shadow* position speaks of stable structure and protective authority you can stand on. Its keywords — structure, authority, boundaries, order — color how this archetype is moving for you now. In your chart, this trump already lives here: Ascendant in Aries (house 1) — The Emperor working through identity and embodiment.
